channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: NASA released thousands more photos from Artemis II. Here are 9 of the best. - NBC News
item.description:
1. NASA released thousands more photos from Artemis II. Here are 9 of the best.  NBC News

  5. NASA just released 12,000 photos from Artemis 2. Here are our top picks  Space

item.title: James Webb Space Telescope directly studies an exoplanet's surface for the 1st time: 'We see a dark, hot, barren rock' - Space
item.description:
1. James Webb Space Telescope directly studies an exoplanet's surface for the 1st time: 'We see a dark, hot, barren rock'  Space
  2. Astronomers Explore the Surface Composition of a Nearby Super-Earth  Center for Astrophysics | Harvard & Smithsonian
  3. The dark and featureless surface of rocky exoplanet LHS 3844 b from JWST mid-infrared spectroscopy  nature.com
  4. Webb space telescope reveals a scorching “super-Earth” that looks like Mercury  ScienceDaily
  5. Astronomers Determine the Surface of a Rocky Planet Beyond Our Solar System for the First Time  ZME Science
